# Acceptance criteria

| ID | Given / When / Then | Verifies |
|---|---|---|
| AC-001 | Given a long URL, when submitted, then a unique short code is returned. | FR-001 |
| AC-002 | Given a known short code, when requested, then the user is redirected. | FR-002 |
| AC-003 | Given a link with prior visits, when viewed, then the count matches. | FR-003 |
